comment: Published / disclosed inhaled mRNA-LNP programs used as expression-kinetics anchors. Numbers are dosing or expression durations reported in primary literature, IND filings, or company disclosures. Order-of-magnitude anchors for the dose-AUC model.

programs.program: Translate Bio MRT5005 (CFTR mRNA inhalation, CF)
programs.now: Acquired by Sanofi 2021; CF program wound down 2022 due to insufficient ppFEV1 improvement in Phase 1/2 SP201 — failure was protein-folding/abundance not delivery
programs.lesson_for_il1ra: Vibrating-mesh nebulizer + mRNA-LNP can be repeat-dosed in CF patients for 8 weeks safely at 8-24 mg per administration. CFTR is membrane protein in epithelial cells; IL-1Ra is secreted soluble protein and a vastly easier folding target.
programs.source: Rowe et al. 2023 J Cyst Fibros; ClinicalTrials.gov NCT03375047

programs.program: Arcturus LUNAR-CF / ARCT-032 (CFTR mRNA inhalation, CF)
programs.status_2026: Phase 2 ongoing; interim Phase 1 data showed dose-dependent CFTR mRNA expression in nasal epithelium
programs.lesson_for_il1ra: Second-generation inhaled mRNA-LNP program with disclosed nasal epithelial CFTR mRNA detection — direct evidence that inhaled mRNA reaches and translates in airway epithelium

programs.program: ReCode Therapeutics RCT2100 (PCD, CFTR PCD program)
programs.status_2026: Phase 1 inhaled mRNA-LNP for primary ciliary dyskinesia (DNAI1 mRNA) and CFTR; SORT-LNP technology with lung tropism
programs.lesson_for_il1ra: SORT-LNP class adds organ-tropism beyond passive lung deposition; relevant for any next-generation inhaled mRNA program

programs.program: Ethris SNIM-RNA platform (chemically modified mRNA for inhalation)
programs.status_2026: Preclinical / partnership stage; AstraZeneca collaboration for pulmonary mRNA
programs.lesson_for_il1ra: Independent inhaled-mRNA chemistry track — chemically modified nucleosides for stability under nebulization shear

programs.program: Moderna respiratory mRNA pipeline (mRNA-1083, mRNA-1647 etc.)
programs.status_2026: Mostly IM for vaccines; mRNA-1083 (combined flu+COVID) Phase 3 2024-2025. Moderna has disclosed inhaled-LNP preclinical work but no clinical inhaled-mRNA program
programs.lesson_for_il1ra: Not directly an inhaled-mRNA precedent. LNP IP and manufacturing capacity relevant; pulmonary clinical track absent.
programs.evidence_level: Preclinical for inhaled; Clinical Trial for IM vaccines

programs.status_2026: No disclosed inhaled-mRNA clinical program; vaccine focus IM
programs.lesson_for_il1ra: BioNTech's LNP+mRNA expertise is industry-leading but inhaled is not their current track

lng_expression_anchors.comment: Published kinetic anchors used in the dose-AUC model. Sourced from preclinical inhaled mRNA-LNP studies and pulmonary protein expression literature.

alveolar_epithelial_translation_efficien.comment: Mass ratio (protein produced / mRNA delivered) integrated over the 24-48h expression window. Each mRNA template translates many times before degradation; modified-nucleoside chemistry extends template life. BNT162b2 30 ug IM yields tens-to-hundreds of ug total spike production in tissue (mass ratio ~1-10x); inhaled mRNA-LNP in alveolar epithelium reaches comparable or higher local concentration. Wide log-uniform prior 1-50x to reflect cross-platform variability.
alveolar_epithelial_translation_efficien.source: Pardi et al. 2018 Nat Rev Drug Discov (review of mRNA therapeutics); Ogata 2022 Clin Infect Dis (BNT162b2 plasma protein detection); Patel 2019 ACS Nano (lung-localized mRNA-LNP); Cheng et al. 2020 Nat Nanotech (SORT-LNP organ targeting). Specific quantitative anchor for mass-ratio range is order-of-magnitude inference across these reports; primary-paper verification for the integrated mass-ratio is queued.

expression_duration_hours_pulmonary.comment: Pulmonary mRNA-LNP expression typically peaks 12-24h, decays by 48-72h with N1-methylpseudouridine; matches the 12-72h flare window almost exactly
expression_duration_hours_pulmonary.source: Karikó-Weissman chemistry + pulmonary precedents in CF mRNA programs

lung_delivery_efficiency_nebulizer.comment: Vibrating-mesh nebulizer typical lower-airway delivery 20-40% of nominal dose; particles <5 um. Variability driven by inhaler technique, particle-size distribution.
lung_delivery_efficiency_nebulizer.source: PARI eFlow performance data; Geller 2009 Respir Care nebulizer efficiency review

systemic_bioavailability_protein_from_al.comment: Alveolar -> systemic protein transit for 10-30 kDa proteins; varies with FcRn-class transcytosis. IL-1Ra is non-glycosylated 17 kDa, no FcRn binding, so transit by paracellular + transcellular diffusion. Patton & Byron 2007 Nat Rev Drug Discov is the canonical reference.
systemic_bioavailability_protein_from_al.source: Patton & Byron 2007 Nat Rev Drug Discov; Afrezza inhaled insulin precedent
